use_cases: Select any color from a full-screen rainbow spectrum gradient for design workflows
Copy hex color values to clipboard with visual feedback for quick color sharing
Preview mouse coordinates and selected color in real-time during color exploration
ai_summary: A full-screen interactive color picker that renders a canvas-based rainbow gradient with white/black overlays for lightness control. Users hover over the gradient to preview colors, with hex values displayed and click-to-copy functionality. Features real-time mouse position tracking and copy confirmation feedback, making it ideal for design tools and developer workflows requiring precise color selection.
